backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for cross-compilation targeting the specified Java version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce API compatibility with the target Java version, potentially allowing usage of APIs not available in the target runtime.
